title: calendar view
excerpt: Hello, is there any way to display hours from hour column in calendar view?

posts.author: lizi (lizi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, is there any way to display hours from hour column in calendar view?

image603×353 7.5 KB

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, Using calendar if you view the week view does it show the hours along the side?

image1648×870 52 KB
Trying to understand the usecase, do you need the hours the meeting takes for example? I believe currently, the Calendar View in Monday.com primarily displays items based on date columns (like Date or Timeline), but itn does not natively support displaying specific times or hours from an Hour column directly in the calendar view.
